title: sorghum leucostachyum
intro: Sorghum leucostachyum, also known as broom sorghum, is a type of grass that belongs to the sorghum family and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of sorghum leucostachyum include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating various skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, sorghum leucostachyum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
